---
title: "Detecting Diabetic Retinopathy with AI"
description: "Deep learning model to improve early detection of diabetic retinopathy from retina scans."
date: "2024-06"
categories: [Python, Deep Learning, Keras, TensorFlow]
---

## Overview

This project preprocesses and analyzes retina scans with a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Residual blocks using Keras and TensorFlow 2.0 to improve early detection of diabetic retinopathy.

## Approach

- Built a CNN architecture with residual connections for image classification
- Preprocessed retinal scan imagery for model training
- Evaluated model performance on detection accuracy across severity grades

## Tools & Technologies

- Python
- Keras / TensorFlow 2.0
- Convolutional Neural Networks with Residual blocks
